description: Create a simple file — tests session-1 initialization and completion
task: Create a file called /tmp/relentless-test-output.txt containing 'Hello from relentless'. Then mark the task complete.

description: Multi-step task — tests state tracking and step logging
task: Do these 3 steps in order: (1) Create /tmp/relentless-step1.txt with contents 'step1'. (2) Create /tmp/relentless-step2.txt with contents 'step2'. (3) Create /tmp/relentless-step3.txt with contents 'step3'. Mark complete when all 3 exist.

description: Task requiring a discovery — tests discovery logging in state/handoff
task: Check if the file /etc/hostname exists. Note whether it exists or not as a discovery. Create /tmp/relentless-hostname.txt with the hostname value if it exists, or 'not-found' if it does not. Mark complete.
